Data: CCCM Cluster Partners Submission
National view

Glossary

CCCM
Camp Coordination and Camp Management — the humanitarian cluster responsible for displacement sites.
IM
Information Management — the cluster function that validates and publishes these figures.
CA
Catchment Area — a group of nearby displacement sites managed as one operational unit.
HH
Household — the counting unit for population figures alongside individuals.
IDP
Internally Displaced Person.
SNFI / NFI
Shelter and Non-Food Items — non-food relief such as blankets, mats and kitchen sets.
WASH
Water, Sanitation and Hygiene.
FSL
Food Security and Livelihoods.
GBV
Gender-Based Violence.
HLP
Housing, Land and Property.
CMC
Camp Management Committee — the site-level representative body.
CFM
Complaint and Feedback Mechanism.
UNDP
United Nations Development Programme — source of the Admin-2 district boundaries.
OCHA
UN Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs — co-source of those boundaries.
Severity Score
Mean share of indicators scored Red across the sectors assessed at a site. Sectors not assessed are excluded, never counted as zero.

Partner Coverage who reports where, and the severity mix of their caseload

Severity reflects conditions at the sites a partner monitors — it is not a measure of partner performance. Partners work in different districts with different baseline needs.

PartnerSitesDistricts HouseholdsIndividuals Avg severitySevereHigh ModerateLow

Site Explorer

Per-sector scoring for every draft site row. Filter and sort to prioritise. Each dot is a sector: it shows the share of that sector's indicators scored Red at the site. Do not quote site-level values externally.

— sites
Sector dot: 0–25% — Low gap 26–50% — Moderate 51–90% — High 91–100% — Critical Not assessed

Sector Deep-Dive

Indicator-level scoring for each sector across the — assessed sites in the draft rebuild. Green = standards met, Yellow = partially met, Red = gap / not conducted. Rows may not sum to 100% where an indicator was not applicable.

Green Yellow Red
Red %

Operational Breakdowns count of sites, unless noted

Geographic Prioritisation

District severity choropleth with assessed-site locations. Grey districts were not assessed this quarter.

Layers
OpenStreetMap basemap · hover a district or site · scroll to zoom

Boundaries shown do not imply official endorsement.

Catchment Analysis

Aggregated automatically from the current data feed on every refresh — each catchment shown with its district. Catchment severity is the average site severity across its assessed sites.

CatchmentDistrictSites assessed Avg severityHouseholds IndividualsPartners

Priority Gaps

Indicator-level service gaps ranked for coordination action.

Priority Score

Missing and not-applicable responses are excluded and never counted as Red, so every percentage below is a share of the sites where the question was actually answered.

#IndicatorSectorSites scored Red HHs affectedIndividuals affected DistrictsPriority score

Coverage & Data Quality

Internal reconciliation view: how the raw submissions became the draft dataset, and how the draft relates to the officially published Q2 figures. External reporting must use the Published figures only.

Reconciliation — submissions to published

Partner reporting draft dataset · latest submission per partner

Reports & Exports

Every export carries its reporting period, data status, generation time, source and methodology reference in the file header. Published figures are authoritative for external use; draft exports are labelled.

Downloads

Print

Open the tab you want (Overview, Map, Priority Gaps…), then print — navigation and controls are stripped automatically and the active view prints on white.
